page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool for sensitive iterative sequence searching based on HMM-HMM comparison. Starting from a single sequence or an alignment, it is able to build alignments with as many near or remote homologs as possible allowing users to explore protein superfamilies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool for sensitive iterative sequence searching based on HMM-HMM comparison. Starting from a single sequence or an alignment, it is able to build alignments with as many near or remote homologs as possible allowing users to explore protein superfamilies.
